title: unhandled exception MSSQL database settings
author: psyd01986
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
after selecting the database mssql and checking the connection, when the YES button is pressed, an unhandled exception occurs
## Exception message
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->
```
Сообщение исключения
"Столбец "RedirectClipboard" не принадлежит таблице ."

Трассировка стека
   в System.Data.DataRow.GetDat...

iterations.description: DataTableDeserializer crashes on older MSSQL schemas missing columns added in later upgrades (e.g. RedirectClipboard from v26→27) because it lacks Columns.Contains guards

notes:
AI triage (claude): DataTableDeserializer crashes on older MSSQL schemas missing columns added in later upgrades (e.g. RedirectClipboard from v26→27) because it lacks Columns.Contains guards
Approach: Add dataRow.Table.Columns.Contains() guards for all columns introduced by SQL schema upgraders (RedirectClipboard, RedirectAudioCapture, etc.), following the existing pattern already used for IsTemplate (line 108) and EnvironmentTags (line 165)
